decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 6/10 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 8 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 9 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 113/3308 lines reworked (3.4%, 18/50). 0/33 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 8.5% (2/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 55. Session 8: 59 (process:30 efficiency:20 ttfw:9). Session 10: 59 (process:30 efficiency:19 ttfw:10). Session 11: 40 (process:30 efficiency:8 ttfw:2). Session 12: 50 (process:30 efficiency:16 ttfw:4).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 250/250 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Only one adapter implements an interface. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
